title: Hulu to Stream MAO Anime
content: The anime will premiere on the NHK -General channel on April 4 at 11:45 p.m. (10:45 a.m. EST). It will air for continuous two- cours (quarters of a year) run without breaks. The cast members are: • Yūki Kaji as Mao • Natsumi Kawaida as Nanoka Kiba • Hiro Shimono as Hyakka • Toshiyuki Toyonaga as Kamon • Momoka…
author: ANN

title: Black Clover Reveals New Release Date Update on “Super Climax”
content: Black Clover is set to be one of the biggest anime comebacks of 2026, with the anime adaptation set to return thanks to Studio Pierrot after being away for years. Before the television series returns, however, we might see the source material, aka the manga, take a bow by bringing Asta’s journey to an end.
author: ComicBook

title: South Park’s Biggest Project is Finally Streaming For Free
content: South Park has been in the news quite a bit over the past year, with headlines ranging from the subject matter of the show itself to behind-the-scenes production controversies. Luckily, the small Colorado town has returned to the news in a way that might be seen as a major boon for the fans.
author: ComicBook

title: Kantai Collection's C2 Kikan Reveals Ki-gō Keikaku Game
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for game developer C2 Kikan announced on Wednesday a new 3D simulation role-playing game titled Ki-gō Keikaku (Plan Number Ki) is in development for PC and mobile. Team members Konishi and Shibafu will design the characters.
author: ANN

title: Chainsaw Man Could Still Be Hiding Its True Ending for a Brand-New Chapter
content: Chainsaw Man ’s ending is here, despite fans hoping for a continuation with a Part 3. There’s no denying that its conclusion is one of the most abrupt endings in manga, especially given Fujimoto’s intricate and deeply layered storytelling.
author: ComicBook

title: 'Honey Lemon Soda' Concludes Ten-Year Serialization
content: Mayu Murata 's Honey Lemon Soda will conclude in the May 2026 issue of Ribon Magazine on April 3. The 124th chapter will mark the end of its 10-year serialization. Murata began serializing the school romance manga in Ribon Magazine in December 2015.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Tiger & Bunny Anime Gets Stage Play to Celebrate 15th Anniversary
content: The original Tiger & Bunny television anime series centers around heroes for hire — super powered beings known as NEXT who wear sponsor logos while fighting crime on live television.
author: ANN

title: Gachiakuta RPG Reveals New Character Trailers
content: The official YouTube channels for Com2uS Group's RPG Gachiakuta : The Game , based on Kei Urana 's Gachiakuta manga, released character trailers previewing the combat for Zanka, Enjin, Rudo, and Riyo on Monday.
author: ANN

title: The Ogre's Bride Live-Action Film Opens at #3, Poupelle of Chimney Town Anime at #5 in Japan
content: The 2026 Doraemon film , Eiga Doraemon: Shin Nobita no Kaitei Kiganjō ( Doraemon the Movie: New Nobita and the Castle of the Undersea Devil ), stayed at #1 in its fifth weekend at the Japanese box office last weekend.
author: ANN

title: LINE Yahoo Gains Control of Kakao Games Following Stake Acquisition (Updated)
content: LINE Yahoo! has become the largest shareholder of Kakao Games following a recent stake acquisition, marking a shift in the company's ownership structure. Kakao Games CEO Sang-woo Han said on March 26 that no specific management changes or organizational restructuring have been decided.
author: ANN
